tasks.title: Confirm contamination baseline
tasks.objective: Document existing workflow metadata exposure through the Express server and regression tests before remediation.

integrationPoints.rationale: Product server caches workflow metadata and merges it into progress payloads; baseline must confirm exposure before removal.
Dedicated endpoint surfaces workflow metadata to clients; reproducing its response confirms contamination.
Vitest suite exercises the contaminated endpoint and will capture baseline behavior before deletion.

tasks.title: Remove workflow metadata from product runtime
tasks.objective: Strip workflow caching and status exposure from the Express server so progress payloads contain only product state.

integrationPoints.rationale: Progress snapshots previously merged workflowMetadata into SSE payloads; removing the merge isolates product fields.
Session bootstrap no longer primes workflow caches before orchestrating executions.
Regression coverage updated to assert workflow metadata is absent from REST snapshots.

tasks.title: Isolate workflow state module
tasks.objective: Move the workflow state synthesizer out of src/, repoint CLI tooling, and ensure tests import the isolated module path.

integrationPoints.rationale: Shared workflow synthesizer currently lives under src/ and must relocate to a workflow-specific directory.
CLI next-action helper imports the shared module directly from src/; path must update after relocation.
Regression suite validates workflow module behavior and needs to reference the new workflow/ location.
Type import should track the new module path to keep legacy endpoint coverage compiling while route is removed.

tasks.title: Persist contract validation evidence
tasks.objective: Augment the contract sync script so validation command outputs are preserved in the contract and enforce the behavior with targeted tests.

integrationPoints.rationale: Validation executor currently discards stdout/stderr; it must capture command results for validation_results persistence.
Task evaluation needs to return validation evidence data alongside status updates.
Contract writer must merge new validation_results into task records when syncing Phase 19.

integrationPoints.symbol: it("marks Phase 19 tasks complete when evidence checks pass")
integrationPoints.rationale: Regression test needs to assert validation_results arrays are populated after sync completes.

notes: Baseline verification requires observing server imports and executing the workflow status API test without modification.
